reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCNk5TdERnEAE

reviews.comment:
Paramos a almorzar ahí por qué no encontramos otro lugar abierto. Pero estuvo bueno por que había aire acondicionado, ya que afuera era un horno. Comimos unas hamburguesas que estaban ricas pero medio frías. Nos atendieron más o menos, por qué estaban haciendo el cambio de turno y no nos dieron mucha bola.

(Translated by Google)
We stopped there for lunch because we couldn't find anywhere else open. It was nice because there was air conditioning, since it was like an oven outside. We had some hamburgers that were tasty but kind of cold. The service was so-so because they were changing shifts and didn't pay much attention to us.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Lucila. Una de cal y una de arena. Perdón por los inconvenientes. El cambio turno es complicado, pero te prometemos que nos ajustaremos para la próxima

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCa0pMcGZ3EAE
